recommendations.title: Amusement
recommendations.overview: While being interrogated by a police psychiatrist, the near-catatonic Tabitha tries to explain why she and two of her childhood friends are being hunted by a serial killer. The truth that's dying to come out weaves together three tragic secrets from

recommendations.title: While the Wolf's Away
recommendations.overview: A young teen and his misfit group of friends try to escape from a strict boarding school that holds dangerous secrets.

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: They Look Like People
recommendations.overview: Suspecting that people are transforming into malevolent shape-shifters, Wyatt flees to New York City to seek out his estranged childhood friend Christian.

recommendations.title: Surveillance
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent tracks a serial killer with the help of three of his would-be victims - all of whom have wildly different stories to tell.

recommendations.title: Exposed
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a miracle, a young Latina woman experiences strange things as a police detective searches for the truth behind his partner's death.

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: The Girl Who Got Away
recommendations.overview: A female serial killer who killed four young girls is sent away to prison, but a fifth victim escaped with her life. Twenty years later, the killer escapes and begins hunting for the one who got away.

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Monster Summer
recommendations.overview: When a mysterious force begins to disrupt their big summer fun, Noah and his friends team up with a retired police detective to embark on a monstrous adventure to save their island.
